card.title: Hormones (BHRT)
card.description: We use bioidentical hormones, which are structurally identical to the body's natural hormones, allowing for a more natural integration into the body's endocrine system. Hormone therapy is not a transaction but an ongoing process. With Joi, you'll be supported with 1:1 care through a provider and a coach.
card.finePrint: No membership required. We bill & ship quarterly and you can cancel your subscription at any time. Due to state regulations we cannot ship test...
